sku_id: Wood Floor Restorer & Polish 16oz– High-Gloss Finish, Repairs Fine Scratches, Non-Slip, Abrasio and Scrub-Resistant, Moisture-Resistant, Non-Greasy, No Footprints,

videos.prompt:
Create a 10-second vertical TikTok-style satisfying result ad video.
Timeline:
0-3s: Start with a satisfying real-life result. Close-up of DAXAXA Wood Floor Restorer & Polish 16oz being applied to a dull scratched wood floor. As it dries, the floor transforms into a mirror-like high-gloss surface.
3-6s: Show the real pain point behind the result. visible fine scratches catching light, dull patches in high-traffic areas, water stains, footprints that never wipe away mopping repeatedly with no improvement, considering expensive refinishing, or just living with ugly floors
6-10s: Show the product solving the problem clearly. apply DAXAXA Wood Floor Restorer & Polish 16oz with a flat mop, spread evenly, and let dry to a high-gloss finish scratches disappear under a glossy protective layer, floors look brand new
Keep the pacing fast, realistic, and product-focused.
Do not use exaggerated magic effects.
Do not invent product functions.
Use the provided product reference images as the exact product identity.
Do not change the product color, shape, material, size ratio, logo position, texture, or visible structure.
Do not invent extra accessories, buttons, lights, packaging, or exaggerated functions.
Use the detail and side reference image to preserve product material, side structure, edge shape, texture, and visible details.
Use the function reference image only to understand the real product usage. Do not invent new functions.
